source_pr.title: *: pass sql, plan digest down to KV request
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

Track issue: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24875

Related PR: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/24380

### What problem does this PR solve?

This PR use to implement the part of TopSQL feature.

For TiKV to collection resource by SQL statements, TiDB need pass the `sql digest` and `plan digest` down to TiKV.

### What is changed and how it works?

1. Encode the `sql digest` and `plan digest` to `[]byte` and the set on `kv.Context.ResourceGroupTag`.


### Related PR

- https://github.com/pingcap/tipb/pull/223 add resource group tag definition
- https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/1231 Add Digest struct to get bytes of digest

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: fix race.
